events.name: Carroll Center for the Blind: Waltham Lions Carnival
events.description: Join us for a special afternoon at the Waltham Lions Carnival, reserved exclusively for children with vision, learning, and sensory needs and their families. Enjoy rides, fun activities, and time to connect with fellow Carroll Center families. RSVP before May 1 by emailing Barbara Duffy at barbara.duffy@c​arroll.org
